title: Dogon Cosmogony: Amma and the Cosmic Egg
description: The Dogon creation narrative: Amma vibrates the cosmic egg, producing the Nommo spirits and the spiral structure of the universe.
introduction: The Dogon creation narrative: Amma vibrates the cosmic egg, producing the Nommo spirits and the spiral structure of the universe.

translation.original_text: Amma, in the beginning, was alone. Amma created the egg of the world.
